metadata.description: Deep video work for coding agents: analyze, search, caption, clip, detect faces, and publish video via the tinycloud CLI.

plugins.name: tinycloud
plugins.description: Video understanding and editing via the tinycloud CLI (Cloudglue): watch/extract/search/ask/face over videos, captions, clips, collections, plus one-command workflows for sales coaching, blog posts, ad analysis, meeting breakdowns, and YouTube publishing.
